events.name: breakthrough
events.description: Coding breakthrough: automated drone maintenance saves labor.

events.name: phobos_transit
events.description: Double shadow: Phobos and Deimos transit simultaneously.

events.name: alien_signal
events.description: Repeating pattern in cosmic ray data — statistical fluke or message?

subsim_log.expression: (let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))

meta_awareness.insight: Ora Flame notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.
Ember Clay whispers: 'What if we are variables in someone else's expression?'

memories.event: A bitter dispute over food rationing escalates to shouting.
The primary water recycler fails catastrophically.
Accusations of resource hoarding fracture the colony trust.
Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.
Lava tube entrance found — potential expansion space.
Unknown pathogen spreads through the water system.
Double shadow: Phobos and Deimos transit simultaneously.
Ice deposits discovered beneath the eastern ridge.
New hydroponics technique doubles crop yield per unit water.
Severe radiation event — all colonists confined to shielded core.
Cryovolcanic eruption 200km north — ground tremors felt.
The worst dust storm in decades buries the southern airlock.
Earth sends updated colony charter with governance suggestions.
A rich vein of iron oxide uncovered during excavation.
Ice geyser breaks through permafrost near the colony perimeter.
Underground cavern with stable temperature discovered.
